title: Fix Rust SimClient: 4-byte LE framing + message type protocol
description: The current SimClient uses 2-byte BE length prefix with no message type protocol. The Python sim server expects 4-byte LE length-prefixed messages with REGISTER/TX/RX/TIME typed payloads. Rewrite client.rs as async tokio to match, enabling lichend --sim to exchange real frames with the Python simulator.
